channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Krebs on Security, The Hacker News, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading

item.title: TeamPCP Hits SAP Packages With 'Mini Shai-Hulud' Attack
item.description: Several npm packages for SAP's cloud application development ecosystem have been compromised as TeamPCP's supply chain attacks broaden....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Another AI-Assisted Software Scan Yields 9-Year-Old Linux Bug
item.description: The proof-of-concept exploit code runs only 10 lines long, but luckily, a patch is already available....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Anthropic's Mythos Has Landed: Here's What Comes Next for Cyber
item.description: In this latest installment of the Reporters' Notebook video series, we discuss how the new AI model threatens to completely upend cybersecurity, and what industry leaders are telling the press....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: New Bluekit phishing service includes an AI assistant, 40 templates
item.description: A new phishing kit named Bluekit offers more than 40 templates targeting popular services and includes basic AI features for generating campaign drafts. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Romanian leader of online swatting ring gets 4 years in prison
item.description: A Romanian national who led an online swatting ring that targeted more than 75 public officials, multiple journalists, and four religious institutions was sentenced to 4 years in federal prison. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: FBI links cybercriminals to sharp surge in cargo theft attacks
item.description: The U.S. Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) warned the transportation and logistics industry of a sharp rise in cyber-enabled cargo theft, with estimated losses in the United States and Canada reac...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: PyTorch Lightning and Intercom-client Hit in Supply Chain Attacks to Steal Credentials
item.description: In yet another software supply chain attack, threat actors have managed to compromise the popular Python package Lightning to push two malicious versions to conduct credential theft. According to Aiki...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: April KB5083769 Windows 11 update causes backup software failures
item.description: The April 2026 KB5083769 security update breaks third-party backup applications from multiple vendors on systems running Windows 11 24H2 and 25H2. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Anti-DDoS Firm Heaped Attacks on Brazilian ISPs
item.description: A Brazilian tech firm that specializes in protecting networks from distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) attacks has been enabling a botnet responsible for an extended campaign of massive DDoS attacks ...
item.dc:creator: Krebs on Security

item.title: What Happens in the First 24 Hours After a New Asset Goes Live
item.description: When a new asset goes live, attackers start scanning within minutes. Sprocket Security shows how automated attacks move from discovery to compromise in under 24 hours. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: ThreatsDay Bulletin: SMS Blaster Busts, OpenEMR Flaws, 600K Roblox Hacks and 25 More Stories
item.description: The internet is noisy this week. We are seeing some wild new tactics, like people using fake cell towers to send scam texts, while some developers are accidentally downloading tools that peek into the...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: New Linux ‘Copy Fail’ flaw gives hackers root on major distros
item.description: An exploit has been published for a local privilege escalation vulnerability dubbed "Copy Fail" that impacts Linux kernels released since 2017, allowing an unprivileged local attacker to gain root per...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Oracle Red Bull Racing Team Revs Up Automation to Boost Security
item.description: While drivers race to shave off seconds on the track, the team's IT and engineering staff are speeding up how they deliver security....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: New Python Backdoor Uses Tunneling Service to Steal Browser and Cloud Credentials
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a stealthy Python-based backdoor framework called DEEP#DOOR that comes with capabilities to establish persistent access and harvest a wide range of ...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Critical cPanel and WHM bug exploited as a zero-day, PoC now available
item.description: The critical CVE-2026-41940 authentication bypass vulnerability in cPanel, WHM, and WP Squared is being actively exploited in the wild and has been leveraged in attempts since late February. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: EtherRAT Distribution Spoofing Administrative Tools via GitHub Facades
item.description: Intro A sophisticated, high-resilience malicious campaign was identified by Atos Threat Research Center (TRC) in March 2026. This operation specifically targets the high-privilege professional account...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Police dismantles 9 crypto scam centers, arrests 276 suspects
item.description: A joint international operation involving U.S. and Chinese authorities arrested at least 276 suspects and shut down nine cryptocurrency investment fraud centers. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: New Linux 'Copy Fail' Vulnerability Enables Root Access on Major Distributions
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a Linux local privilege escalation (LPE) flaw that could allow an unprivileged local user to obtain root. The high-severity vulnerability tracked as...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Google Fixes CVSS 10 Gemini CLI CI RCE and Cursor Flaws Enable Code Execution
item.description: Google has addressed a maximum severity security flaw in Gemini CLI -- the "@google/gemini-cli" npm package and the "google-github-actions/run-gemini-cli" GitHub Actions workflow -- that could have al...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Claude Mythos Fears Startle Japan's Financial Services Sector
item.description: Global financial institutions are panicked over Anthropic's new superhacker AI model. Cyber experts aren't quite as worried....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Official SAP npm packages compromised to steal credentials
item.description: Multiple official SAP npm packages were compromised in what is believed to be a TeamPCP supply-chain attack to steal credentials and authentication tokens from developers' systems. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Popular WordPress redirect plugin hid dormant backdoor for years
item.description: The Quick Page/Post Redirect plugin, installed on more than 70,000 WordPress sites, had a backdoor added five years ago that allows injecting arbitrary code into users' sites. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Hackers exploit RCE flaws in Qinglong task scheduler for cryptomining
item.description: Hackers are exploiting two authentication bypass vulnerabilities in the Qinglong open-source task scheduling tool to deploy cryptominers on developers' servers. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Reverse Engineering With AI Unearths High-Severity GitHub Bug
item.description: Wiz used an AI reverse-engineering tool to pinpoint a vulnerability that previously would have been too costly and time-consuming to undertake....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: AI Finds 38 Security Flaws in Electronic Health Record Platform
item.description: Flaws in OpenEMR's platform — used by more than 100,000 healthcare providers — enabled database compromise, remote code execution, and data theft....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Hackers arrested for hijacking and selling 610,000 Roblox accounts
item.description: The Ukrainian police have arrested three individuals who hacked more than 610,000 Roblox gaming accounts and sold them for a profit of $225,000. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: SAP-Related npm Packages Compromised in Credential-Stealing Supply Chain Attack
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers are sounding the alarm about a new supply chain attack campaign targeting SAP-related npm Packages with credential-stealing malware. According to reports from Aikido Security...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: cPanel, WHM emergency update fixes critical auth bypass bug
item.description: A critical vulnerability affecting all but the latest versions of cPanel and the WebHost Manager (WHM) dashboard could be exploited to obtain access to the control panel without authentication. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Vect 2.0 Ransomware Acts as Wiper, Thanks to Design Error
item.description: The emerging ransomware has been deployed against victims of the TeamPCP supply chain attacks, but organizations should think twice before paying for a decryptor....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: New Wave of DPRK Attacks Uses AI-Inserted npm Malware, Fake Firms, and RATs
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered malicious code in an npm package after a malicious package as a dependency to the project by Anthropic's Claude Opus large language model (LLM). The package i...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News
